/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/Src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/Src/UartDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/Vuart.dir/Vuart.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/Vuart.dir/Vuart___024root__DepSet_hd9b01d36__0.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/Vuart.dir/Vuart___024root__DepSet_ha21bd04d__0.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/Vuart.dir/Vuart___024root__Slow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/Vuart.dir/Vuart___024root__DepSet_ha21bd04d__0__Slow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/Vuart.dir/Vuart__Trace__0.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/Vuart.dir/Vuart__Syms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/Vuart.dir/Vuart__Trace__0__Slow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/Vuart.dir/Vuart__TraceDecls__0__Slow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/usr/share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/usr/share/verilator/include/verilated_vcd_c.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uart_sim.dir/usr/share/verilator/include/verilated_threads.cpp.o -o uart_sim  -pthread -lpthread -latomic
